releasedThisWeek.title: RAVEPOP
releasedThisWeek.artist: r u s s e l b u c k
releasedThisWeek.highlight: 电子流行与说唱碰撞的狂喜节拍
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: Ecstatic beats where electronic pop meets rap
releasedThisWeek.summary: 以电子流行和说唱为核心，营造狂欢氛围，适合派对和情绪释放。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: Centered on electronic pop and rap, creating a carnival atmosphere perfect for parties and emotional release.

releasedThisWeek.title: Together Again
releasedThisWeek.summary: 两位民谣老将携手，带来充满人文关怀的治愈之声。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: Two folk veterans join forces, delivering healing sounds full of human care.

releasedThisWeek.title: Euphoria
releasedThisWeek.highlight: 德国电子乐的诗意升华
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: Poetic elevation of German electronic music
releasedThisWeek.summary: Schiller标志性的氛围电子，融合交响元素，营造宏大而深邃的听觉空间。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: Schiller's signature ambient electronic, blending symphonic elements to create a grand and profound auditory space.

releasedThisWeek.title: DREAMBOY (UNFINISHED)
releasedThisWeek.highlight: Lil Nas X未完成的流行宣言
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: Lil Nas X's unfinished pop manifesto
releasedThisWeek.summary: 尽管未完成，但已展现Lil Nas X大胆融合流行与嘻哈的野心，充满话题性。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: Though unfinished, it showcases Lil Nas X's ambition to boldly fuse pop and hip-hop, full of topicality.

releasedThisWeek.title: Plays World Hits
releasedThisWeek.highlight: 电子编曲的世界名曲巡礼
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: World hits reimagined through electronic arrangement
releasedThisWeek.summary: 用电子合成器重新演绎全球流行金曲，适合背景音乐和怀旧听众。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: Reinterprets global pop hits with electronic synthesizers, suitable for background music and nostalgic listeners.

releasedThisWeek.title: Living Free (Live Manchester '75)
releasedThisWeek.summary: 收录Don McLean 1975年曼彻斯特现场，经典曲目与即兴演绎，珍贵历史录音。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: Features Don McLean's 1975 Manchester live, classic songs with improvisation, a precious historical recording.

releasedThisWeek.title: Warehouse 2026: 7.16.2025 Allianz Amphitheater At Riverfront, Richmond, VA
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: Dave Matthews Band's new 2026 live album
releasedThisWeek.summary: 最新现场专辑，展现乐队即兴演奏的魔力，粉丝必收。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: The latest live album showcasing the band's improvisational magic, a must-have for fans.

releasedThisWeek.title: Thunk
releasedThisWeek.highlight: 澳洲独立摇滚的古怪实验
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: Quirky experiments in Australian indie rock
releasedThisWeek.summary: Jim Moginie与The Family Dog合作，带来充满创意和怪趣的独立摇滚作品。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: Jim Moginie collaborates with The Family Dog, delivering creative and quirky indie rock works.

releasedThisWeek.title: Galaxia Tropical
releasedThisWeek.highlight: 德国制造的拉丁热带风情
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: Latin tropical vibes made in Germany
releasedThisWeek.summary: 由德国乐队演绎的拉丁热带音乐，节奏明快，适合跳舞。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: Latin tropical music performed by a German band, upbeat and danceable.

releasedThisWeek.title: Metal - The Exclusive EP
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: Joyful EP of children's metal music
releasedThisWeek.summary: Heavysaurus专为儿童打造的金属乐，充满能量和趣味，适合全家。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: Heavysaurus creates metal music for children, full of energy and fun, suitable for the whole family.

releasedThisWeek.title: Outroom
releasedThisWeek.highlight: 希腊电子暗潮的深邃探索
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: Deep exploration of Greek electronic darkwave
releasedThisWeek.summary: X-Tram带来阴郁而富有层次的电子氛围，适合深夜聆听。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: X-Tram delivers dark and layered electronic atmospheres, perfect for late-night listening.

releasedThisWeek.title: Pause for a moment
releasedThisWeek.highlight: 瑞士摇摆乐的优雅瞬间
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: Elegant moments of Swiss swing music
releasedThisWeek.summary: Dela Hüttner’s SwingThing带来经典摇摆乐，轻松愉悦，适合悠闲时光。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: Dela Hüttner’s SwingThing brings classic swing music, light and joyful, perfect for leisurely moments.

upcoming.title: could never forget
upcoming.highlight: kkaydes的专辑《could never forget》是一张充满氛围感的电子流行专辑，适合深夜聆听。
upcoming.highlightEn: kkaydes' album 'could never forget' is an atmospheric electronic pop album perfect for late-night listening.
upcoming.summary: 这张专辑融合了氛围电子和流行元素，营造出深邃的情感空间，适合喜欢沉浸式音乐体验的听众。
upcoming.summaryEn: This album blends ambient electronic and pop elements, creating a deep emotional space for listeners seeking immersive music.

upcoming.title: Romance De La Venganza
upcoming.highlight: Krystal Martínez-Rodríguez的《Romance De La Venganza》是一张充满拉丁风情的复仇浪漫专辑。
upcoming.highlightEn: Krystal Martínez-Rodríguez's 'Romance De La Venganza' is a Latin-infused album of vengeful romance.
upcoming.summary: 专辑以复仇与浪漫为主题，融合拉丁节奏和戏剧性编曲，情感强烈且富有故事性。
upcoming.summaryEn: Themed around revenge and romance, the album combines Latin rhythms with dramatic arrangements, delivering intense emotion and storytelling.

upcoming.title: RAVEPOP
upcoming.artist: r u s s e l b u c k
upcoming.highlight: r u s s e l b u c k的《RAVEPOP》是一张高能量的电子舞曲专辑，派对必备。
upcoming.highlightEn: r u s s e l b u c k's 'RAVEPOP' is a high-energy electronic dance album, a must for parties.
upcoming.summary: 这张专辑充满狂野的节拍和迷幻的合成器，营造出狂欢氛围，适合舞池或独自释放。
upcoming.summaryEn: Packed with wild beats and psychedelic synths, this album creates a rave atmosphere perfect for the dance floor or solo release.

upcoming.title: Together Again
upcoming.highlight: John McCutcheon和Tom Paxton的《Together Again》是一张温暖的民谣合作专辑。
upcoming.highlightEn: John McCutcheon and Tom Paxton's 'Together Again' is a warm folk collaboration album.
upcoming.summary: 两位民谣传奇再度联手，带来质朴而深情的歌曲，充满人文关怀和岁月沉淀。
upcoming.summaryEn: Two folk legends reunite to deliver simple yet heartfelt songs, full of human warmth and the patina of time.

upcoming.title: Euphoria
upcoming.highlight: Schiller的《Euphoria》是一张宏大的氛围电子专辑，带你进入迷幻之旅。
upcoming.highlightEn: Schiller's 'Euphoria' is a grand ambient electronic album, taking you on a psychedelic journey.
upcoming.summary: Schiller以其标志性的氛围电子风格，构建了一个充满空间感和情感张力的声音宇宙，适合深度聆听。
upcoming.summaryEn: With his signature ambient electronic style, Schiller builds a sonic universe full of spatial depth and emotional tension, ideal for deep listening.

upcoming.title: DREAMBOY (UNFINISHED)
upcoming.highlight: Lil Nas X的《DREAMBOY (UNFINISHED)》是一张实验性的流行专辑，挑战常规。
upcoming.highlightEn: Lil Nas X's 'DREAMBOY (UNFINISHED)' is an experimental pop album challenging conventions.
upcoming.summary: Lil Nas X再次突破边界，融合多种音乐元素，歌词大胆，制作精良，是2025年最受期待的流行作品之一。
upcoming.summaryEn: Lil Nas X pushes boundaries again, blending diverse musical elements with bold lyrics and polished production, one of the most anticipated pop works of 2025.

upcoming.title: Electric Fantasy
upcoming.highlight: Pierre Schott的《Electric Fantasy》是一张古典与电子融合的梦幻专辑。
upcoming.highlightEn: Pierre Schott's 'Electric Fantasy' is a dreamy album fusing classical and electronic music.
upcoming.summary: 钢琴与电子音色交织，营造出既古典又现代的氛围，适合安静放松或背景音乐。
upcoming.summaryEn: Piano and electronic textures intertwine to create an atmosphere both classical and modern, suitable for relaxation or background music.

upcoming.title: Eingenordet
upcoming.highlight: Versengold的《Eingenordet》是一张充满北欧民谣金属力量的概念专辑。
upcoming.highlightEn: Versengold's 'Eingenordet' is a concept album full of Nordic folk metal power.
upcoming.summary: 专辑以北欧神话为背景，融合重金属与民谣旋律，气势磅礴，故事性强。
upcoming.summaryEn: Set against Norse mythology, the album blends heavy metal with folk melodies, epic in scale and rich in storytelling.

upcoming.title: Living Free (Live Manchester '75)
upcoming.highlight: Don McLean的《Living Free (Live Manchester '75)》是一张珍贵的现场专辑，记录经典。
upcoming.highlightEn: Don McLean's 'Living Free (Live Manchester '75)' is a precious live album capturing classics.
upcoming.summary: 收录1975年曼彻斯特现场演出，Don McLean以深情嗓音演绎《American Pie》等经典，音质修复极佳。
upcoming.summaryEn: Featuring the 1975 Manchester concert, Don McLean performs classics like 'American Pie' with heartfelt vocals, with excellent audio restoration.

upcoming.title: The Power Station
upcoming.highlight: The Power Station的同名专辑《The Power Station》是一张复古摇滚的重磅回归。
upcoming.highlightEn: The Power Station's self-titled album 'The Power Station' is a重磅 comeback of retro rock.
upcoming.summary: 传奇乐队重组，带来充满爆发力的硬摇滚与放克节奏，重现80年代风采。
upcoming.summaryEn: The legendary band reunites, delivering explosive hard rock and funk rhythms, reviving the spirit of the 80s.

upcoming.title: Galaxia Tropical
upcoming.highlight: Ranil Y Su Conjunto Tropical的《Galaxia Tropical》是一张充满热带节奏的拉丁专辑。
upcoming.highlightEn: Ranil Y Su Conjunto Tropical's 'Galaxia Tropical' is a Latin album full of tropical rhythms.
upcoming.summary: 融合萨尔萨、坎比亚等拉丁风格，节奏明快，适合跳舞和派对。
upcoming.summaryEn: Blending salsa, cumbia and other Latin styles, the upbeat rhythms are perfect for dancing and parties.

upcoming.title: One Moment in Time: Live in the USA
upcoming.highlight: Robin Trower的《One Moment in Time: Live in the USA》是一张布鲁斯摇滚的现场盛宴。
upcoming.highlightEn: Robin Trower's 'One Moment in Time: Live in the USA' is a live feast of blues rock.
upcoming.summary: Robin Trower以其标志性的吉他演奏，带来充满灵魂的布鲁斯摇滚现场，即兴段落令人陶醉。
upcoming.summaryEn: Robin Trower delivers a soulful blues rock live set with his signature guitar work, featuring mesmerizing improvisations.
